mapper.sql: l.lawyer_id, COALESCE(v.real_name, u.username) AS name, u.avatar_url AS avatar, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, l.create_time AS update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE( JSON_ARRAYAGG( CASE WHEN s.specialty_id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name) END ), JSON_ARRAY() ) AS specialties

FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id
GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.username, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE l.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specialty}, '%')
